title: Universal Grid
description: Adds a Universal Grid for Refined Storage
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :) This mod only adds a Universal Grid.
**Switchable between:**

1.21.1 or above: - Grid - Crafting Grid - Autocrafting Monitor 1.20.1 or below: - Grid - Crafting Grid - Fluid Grid Recipe:
